name: VariantDataType
summary: Type of data stored in a VariantData class.

enum_values.name: DisplayString
enum_values.summary: String intended for display to the end user (normally localized)

enum_values.name: DateTime
enum_values.summary: A specific date and time (usually UTC)

enum_values.name: DoubleLength
enum_values.summary: A double that represents a length (specific units depend on context)

enum_values.name: DoubleAngle
enum_values.summary: A double that represents an angle in radians

enum_values.name: IdentifierString
enum_values.summary: String intended to be used as a programmatic identifier. 7-bit ASCII characters only.

enum_values.name: DoubleArea
enum_values.summary: A double that species an area (specific units depend on context)

enum_values.name: DoubleVolume
enum_values.summary: A double that species a volume (specific units depend on context)
